milestone: AGH v1 patch C — L5 state_reader scope extension + system prompt surface-guard
scope: Layer 5 state_reader_agent now explicitly allows asset-neutral packets per routed_kind, so research_pending / why_changed bundles never read empty just because the user pinned an asset and the candidate was universe-scoped. _SYSTEM_PROMPT also forbids the LLM from claiming that the Today registry active state has changed (Spec §4.3 / §11).
system_prompt_guards_added: You must NEVER claim that the Today registry has changed its active model family, active band, or active horizon surface.
You may only describe new ingest alerts, pending research candidates, or overlay proposals as *signals to watch* or *proposals*, never as accomplished facts about the Today surface.
The Today active state is only updated by the promotion gate + registry patch, which is outside this response scope.

tests.regression: 102 passed across src/tests/test_agentic_*.py — no pre-existing AGH v1 test regressed.

harness_ask_live_openai_against_DEMO_KR_.answer_ko_snippet: 오늘 DEMO_KR_A 가 움직인 이유는 최근에 수익 발표(transcript)와 관련된 신호가 감지되었기 때문입니다.

doctrinal_alignment.spec_4_3: Proposal / signal-to-watch language only — no buy/sell or deterministic state-change claims.
doctrinal_alignment.spec_11: Today surface mutation path (promotion gate + registry patch) remains outside L5 — enforced in prompt.
doctrinal_alignment.build_plan_12: Direct registry write from L5 = 0. State reader only reads store; guardrails stay on guardrail path.
